title: True Delight
description:
All of the Farmer's Delight mods you could need, and maybe more?
NOTE: I cannot bundle Twilight Forest for you. This is to comply with copyright. You can locate it by searching for "The Twilight Forest" in CurseForge.
body:
True Delight has all of the Farmer's Delight expansions you could ask for, so be ready for some out-of-country dishes, unusual choices of food from the End, and maybe food from... hell? There are also a few extra goodies you may find in the mines...
WARNING: I've attempted to optimize the game to the best of my abilities; however, you may need to adjust your settings slightly to achieve an optimal experience. In testing, I've found the most stable distance to be 8-12 chunks for both Render + Shadow and Simulation distance.
You do not need to use any of the pre-included resource packs or shaders, though they can be used to enhance your experience.

Copyright to mods, resource packs, and shaders belong to their respective owners.
